response: Start by reading nutrition labels to identify hidden sugars in processed foods. Replace sugary drinks with water or herbal tea to reduce your daily intake naturally. Incorporate more whole fruits like [fruit type] to satisfy your sweet cravings with natural fiber. Plan your meals around [meal plan name] to ensure you have balanced options ready.
